name: @jeswr/kernel-mapper
description: Kernel of Truth phrase->concept mapper v0: deterministic transducer from English text to kernel-v0 concept/prime references. Lexicon-driven (concept labels + prime exponents incl. allolexes), rule-based lemmatizer, longest-match-first multiword matching, abstain-and-record ambiguity policy (poc-design.md Phase M; architecture.md section 3.2).
